mapper.sql: id, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time, deleted, version, remark, menu_code, menu_name, parent_id, order_num, `name`, `path`, menu_type, icon, hidden, `status`
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM t_menu m INNER JOIN t_menu_permission mp ON mp.menu_id = m.id INNER JOIN t_permission p ON p.perm_code = mp.perm_code AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = '0' INNER JOIN t_role_permission rp ON rp.perm_code = mp.perm_code INNER JOIN t_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id INNER JOIN t_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = '0' WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.menu_type IN ('D', 'M') AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = '0' ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.order_num
